title: glib2 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[2.68.4-18]
- gdbusconnection: Prevent sending a serial of zero on overflow
- Resolves: RHEL-114059

[2.68.4-17]
- Add patches for CVE-2024-52533 and CVE-2025-4373
- Update GDateTime test for new tzdata
- Resolves: RHEL-94483
- Resolves: RHEL-102844
full_text:
[2.68.4-18]
- gdbusconnection: Prevent sending a serial of zero on overflow
- Resolves: RHEL-114059

[2.68.4-17]
- Add patches for CVE-2024-52533 and CVE-2025-4373
- Update GDateTime test for new tzdata
- Resolves: RHEL-94483
- Resolves: RHEL-102844
